Name: Check SQL Server in High Availability Group
Description: Checks for SQL Node currently being serving as primary on high availability group and sets Octopus variable : SQLIsOnSecondary to true if secondary is active in High Availability Group

Parameters.Name: HAGroupSQLServer
Parameters.Label: Enter server name
Parameters.HelpText: SQL Server name used in connection string from website code

Parameters.Name: HAGroupPrimaryNode
Parameters.Label: Enter primary node
Parameters.HelpText: Enter primary SQL server name which serves traffic
